headline: UnitedHealth Surges 9%, Humana Gains 5% as Earnings Strength Eases Medicare Advantage Concerns
summary: UnitedHealth Group (NYSE:UNH) stock is up 9% today, rising from $323.48 to $351.40, after the company delivered a Q1 2026 earnings report that beat expectations and raised its full-year outlook. The move is lifting the broader managed care sector, with Humana (NYSE:HUM) stock gaining 5%, climbing from $210.34 to $219.91 in sympathy. The catalyst here ... UnitedHealth Surges 9%, Humana Gains 5% as Earnings Strength Eases Medicare Advantage Concerns

headline: How The Humana (HUM) Investment Story Is Shifting Around Medicare Advantage And Valuation
summary: Humana’s consensus fair value has shifted slightly, moving from about US$212.17 to about US$210.46. This leaves the central valuation point only modestly changed. Behind that small adjustment sits a divided analyst backdrop, where some firms are lifting targets after revisiting Medicare Advantage assumptions, while others are trimming targets on ongoing concern about Medicare Advantage margins and CMS rate decisions. As you read on, you will see how these conflicting calls shape the evolving...

headline: UnitedHealth Leads Dow Jones As Earnings Heal, Membership Falls
summary: UnitedHealth Group blew past low earnings expectations as health costs came in much lower than forecast as the number of insured members fell.  Shares of the embattled health giant, which recently reclaimed a key long-term technical level, strode higher early Tuesday, boosting the Dow Jones Industrial Average and peers such as Elevance Health, Humana and CVS Health.  Medical costs as a share of premiums fell to 83.9% in Q1, falling 90 basis points from a year ago and undercutting 85.5% forecasts.

headline: Invesco Equity And Income Fund Q1 2026 Portfolio Review
summary: We purchased a new holding in the consumer discretionary sector. We also eliminated several holdings, using the proceeds to fund investments we believe have better risk/reward profiles.
